text: The Fake News Media is working OVERTIME to destroy me and everything I stand for. CNN is DYING. MSNBC is DYING. The failing New York Times is almost DEAD. Nobody believes them anymore. Total WITCH HUNT on the American People!

Just watched Fake News CNN for 5 minutes. Couldn't take it anymore - TOTAL DISASTER! Their ratings are at an ALL TIME LOW. Nobody watches. Nobody trusts them. The American People are much smarter than these so-called 'journalists.' SAD!

The Lamestream Media refuses to report the TRUTH. They are the enemy of the people - always have been, always will be. But we are fighting back and WINNING! Truth Social is BOOMING while CNN dies a slow, painful death. MAGA!

MSNBC is pure propaganda - nothing more, nothing less. Their hosts are RADICAL LEFT ACTIVISTS posing as journalists. Nobody with a functioning brain watches this garbage. Ratings in total freefall! Couldn't happen to nicer people!

The Washington Post, owned by Jeff Bezos and Amazon, has NEVER written a true story about me. Not once! Pure fake news. Bezos uses it to protect his empire while destroying American businesses. Very unfair! Many people are saying this.

60 Minutes is FAKE NEWS! They edit interviews dishonestly to make great people look bad. A corrupt operation run by very bad, very dishonest people. Their ratings are DYING just like the rest of the Fake News Media. Good!

The New York Times is DEAD! Nobody reads it. Their reporters are far-left ACTIVISTS - not journalists. They hate America, they hate Trump, and they hate YOU. Fine by me. Truth Social has more real readers than the failing Times!

CNN's Don Lemon has been FIRED! Couldn't happen to a more dishonest person. He was TERRIBLE at his job - everyone knew it. CNN is collapsing fast and they still can't figure out why. Because NOBODY TRUSTS THEM!

The 2020 Election was RIGGED and STOLEN - period. The evidence is OVERWHELMING. Dead people voting, suitcases of ballots at 3am, machines that flipped votes. The American People know the truth even if the corrupt media won't report it!

They STOLE the 2020 election and everyone knows it! Biggest political scandal in American history. We had it won by a LANDSLIDE until they stopped counting and then 'found' millions of ballots. NEVER FORGET!

We need VOTER ID in America - every other country has it! Paper ballots only. One day voting. No drop boxes. No unsolicited mail-in ballots. It's so simple, so beautiful, so HONEST. Democrats fight it because they NEED to cheat to win!

The radical left RIGGED the election using every illegal trick in the book. But the truth is coming out - slowly but surely. The Fake News can't cover it up forever. America DESERVES free and fair elections. We will FIGHT until we get them!

Nobody has done more for America than me. NOBODY. Not in modern history. Tax cuts, deregulation, energy independence, peace deals - things they said were IMPOSSIBLE! I proved every single expert wrong. That's what I do. I WIN!

I built the GREATEST economy in the history of the world! That's not me talking, those are the numbers. Unemployment at 50-year lows. Stock market at ALL TIME HIGHS. Real wages UP. Then they stole the election and DESTROYED everything!

They said building the wall was impossible. I built HUNDREDS OF MILES! They said tax cuts would crash the economy. The economy BOOMED! They said peace in the Middle East was impossible. I delivered it! What I do is WIN. Simple!

No president has been treated more UNFAIRLY than me - and despite that, I delivered the greatest results of any president in modern history. The American People know it. History will show it. Even my enemies know it deep down!

I am the only person ever to be indicted four times and become MORE popular! Think about that. Every time they come after me, my poll numbers go UP. The American People see through these WITCH HUNTS. They are coming after YOU through me!

Operation Warp Speed - fastest vaccine development in HISTORY! Normally takes 12 years. I did it in 9 months and saved MILLIONS of lives. No credit from Fake News Media. Very unfair but the American People know the truth!

My golf game is incredible - probably the best of any president, frankly. Tremendous natural athletic ability. Very strong. People don't know this about me but I have always had great athletic talent. Genetics, really. Very good genes!

They gave me NO respect. None. But I kept winning anyway! That's what winners do - they win no matter what. And I am a WINNER. Always have been. The most investigated person in history and they found NOTHING. Because there was NOTHING to find!

Sleepy Joe Biden is the WORST president in American history - it's not even a contest! Destroyed our economy, destroyed our border, embarrassed us worldwide. A complete and total DISASTER from Day One. Crooked to the core!

Crooked Hillary STILL can't accept that she lost in 2016. The most corrupt politician in modern American history. She deleted 33,000 emails, acid-washed her server, destroyed phones with hammers - and nothing happened! Two-tier justice!

Crazy Nancy Pelosi has done NOTHING for her district. San Francisco is an absolute DISASTER - the worst in the country! Drugs, crime, homeless everywhere. She's been there for decades and the city gets worse every year. TOTAL FAILURE!

Adam Schiff is the BIGGEST LIAR in the history of Congress - and that's really saying something! Made up quotes, fabricated evidence, ran the most corrupt investigation in history. Pencil Neck should be in PRISON for what he's done!

Mitch McConnell is the most UNPOPULAR politician in America for a reason - he's done NOTHING! Total failure who should have retired long ago. Blocked great legislation, gave in to Democrats constantly. A complete and utter disaster! Sad!

Mike Pence CHOKED when it mattered most. He had a chance to make history and instead took the easy way out. VERY WEAK! America needed courage on January 6th and he had none. A good person perhaps, but not the right person for the job!

Ron DeSanctimonious has been a TOTAL DISAPPOINTMENT! I made him Governor - without me he was nothing. This is how he repays me? Very disloyal. No personality, no charisma, nothing. Florida deserves better than a GLOBALIST RHINO!

Under my leadership, we had the GREATEST economy in the history of our Country! 401Ks through the roof. Unemployment at 50-year lows. Real wages rising. Energy independence. Then Biden DESTROYED it all in record time. Shameful!

Inflation is KILLING American families! Under Biden everything costs more - groceries, gas, housing, everything! Under Trump prices were LOW and jobs were EVERYWHERE. Day One of my return, we will bring prices down IMMEDIATELY!

Gas was $1.87 a gallon under Trump! Now look at it - $4, $5, some places $6! This is what happens when radical leftists run things. Your wallet is being DESTROYED while Biden reads from his teleprompter. We will fix it FAST when I return!

The Stock Market was at ALL TIME HIGHS under Trump! I created more stock market records than any president in history. Your 401K was BOOMING. Now Biden has destroyed the greatest economy ever built. We will bring it back - BIGGER AND BETTER!

China is RIPPING US OFF! Billions and billions every year leaving America and going to China. For decades nobody did anything. I put tariffs on China and they DIDN'T LIKE IT. Good! That's how you know it was working. We were winning!

China must PAY for what they did with the China Virus! Millions of lives lost worldwide. It came from the Wuhan Lab - everyone knows it now. I said it first! The media mocked me. Then they admitted I was right. As USUAL!

We cannot allow China to continue stealing our intellectual property, manipulating their currency, and dumping cheap goods into our market. I was the ONLY president who stood up to China. Biden is OWNED by China. Sad and dangerous!

The Deep State is REAL and they have been working against me and against YOU since Day One! FBI, DOJ, CIA - all weaponized against conservatives. SPYGATE was the biggest political crime in American history. Nobody covers it!

They came after me because I am the only one who THREATENS the Deep State establishment. These are bad people who have controlled Washington for decades. I exposed them. Now they want revenge. But the American People are WITH ME!

The Russia Hoax was a COMPLETE fabrication by corrupt FBI agents and Democrat operatives. $40 million, two years, and they found NOTHING! Because there was NOTHING. Yet Hillary and Obama walk free after real crimes. Two-tier justice!

James Comey is the most corrupt FBI Director in history! He leaked classified documents, lied under oath, and ran a political operation against me. Should be in PRISON. Instead he writes books and goes on fake news TV. Disgusting!

Just had the most INCREDIBLE rally in American history! Hundreds of thousands of Patriots came from all over the Country. The energy, the love, the spirit - unlike ANYTHING ever seen before! Fake News cameras showed the parking lot. Surprise!

MAGA is not just a slogan - it's a MOVEMENT! The greatest political movement in the history of our Country. Perhaps the history of the world! The Silent Majority has found its voice and we will NEVER be silenced again. MAGA MAGA MAGA!!!

SAVE AMERICA! The radical left wants to destroy everything our Founding Fathers built. They want open borders, they want your guns, they want to control every aspect of your life. WE WILL NOT LET THEM! FIGHT FIGHT FIGHT!

NATO countries MUST pay their fair share! For YEARS they ripped off the United States - billions and billions. Why should American taxpayers defend rich European countries? I made them pay and they HATED IT. Biden gave it all back. WEAK!

There would be NO war in Ukraine if I were president! Putin would have NEVER invaded. Biden is weak, everyone knows it, Putin knew it. Under Trump there was PEACE. Under Biden there is WAR. The numbers don't lie. Very simple!

The United Nations takes our money and does NOTHING for America! Actually they vote AGAINST us most of the time. I cut their funding and they screamed. Good! America First means we don't subsidize a globalist organization that hates us!

Abraham Accords - the greatest Middle East peace deal in DECADES! Israel and Arab nations coming together. Everyone said it was impossible. I did it in 4 years. Obama-Biden tried for 8 years and got NOTHING. Because they don't know how to deal!

LeBron James should stick to basketball! He knows NOTHING about politics and his statements are a total disgrace. He makes hundreds of millions playing a game and can't say a nice word about America. Very ungrateful! Sad!

NFL ratings are DOWN because of the kneeling! You disrespect the American flag, you lose your audience. These athletes make MILLIONS and can't show basic respect for our Country? The fans won't stand for it - literally! BOYCOTT!

Taylor Swift is being used by the Radical Left to push their political agenda. Very unfair to her fans who just want music! I've always liked her music but she should stay out of politics. Artists should entertain, not LECTURE!

Twitter (now X under the great Elon Musk) was a DISASTER for years - total censorship of conservatives while radical leftists could say anything. Elon has done a great job fixing it. Free speech is making a comeback!

They BANNED me from Twitter, Facebook, everywhere - the most powerful man in the world silenced by Big Tech! So I built TRUTH SOCIAL and it is WINNING! You cannot stop the truth. The American People deserve FREE SPEECH!

Google, Facebook, and Twitter were working with Democrats to SUPPRESS conservative voices and interfere in elections. This is the greatest scandal in American history! The First Amendment is under ATTACK by Silicon Valley billionaires!

Forbes NEVER gives me credit for my true net worth! My properties alone - Trump Tower, Mar-a-Lago, Doral, Bedminster, Turnberry - are worth BILLIONS! They lowball me out of spite. Probably because I don't advertise with them. Very dishonest!

Mar-a-Lago is the most beautiful club in the world - everyone says so! World leaders, the biggest stars, the greatest people all want to come. It makes the White House look ordinary by comparison. I know beauty - I CREATE beauty!

Every legitimate poll shows me winning in a LANDSLIDE! The fake polls from CNN and others are rigged - they oversample Democrats on purpose. But even THEIR polls show me winning. The American People love Trump because Trump loves them back!

I am polling at RECORD numbers with Black Americans, Hispanic Americans, Asian Americans - every group! They know I delivered for them: record low unemployment, school choice, opportunity zones. The Democrat coalition is FALLING APART!

ANOTHER WITCH HUNT! This is election interference at the highest level. They indict me because they cannot beat me at the ballot box! Biden's corrupt DOJ weaponized against his political opponent. Never happened before in America. DISGRACEFUL!

Alvin Bragg is a Soros-backed, radical left prosecutor who lets violent criminals walk free but goes after the 45th - and soon to be 47th - President of the United States! The most political prosecution in American history. Total sham!

I am being PERSECUTED like no one in history. More unfairly treated than any president ever. But I keep fighting for YOU - the American People - because that's what leaders do! No matter what they throw at me, WE WILL WIN TOGETHER!

Energy INDEPENDENCE - I gave America energy independence for the first time in decades! Number one in oil and gas production in the world under Trump. Then Biden killed Keystone on Day One and went BEGGING to OPEC. Humiliating!

We defeated ISIS 100%! What Obama couldn't do in 8 years, I did in 9 months. Total caliphate ELIMINATED. Our military was UNLEASHED and they performed brilliantly. No more red lines that mean nothing. Under Trump, we WIN our wars!

No new wars under Trump - NOT ONE! First president in decades. Peace through STRENGTH. Everyone respected America when I was president. Now under Biden we are on the brink of World War 3 because weakness INVITES aggression!

I did more for Veterans than any president in HISTORY! VA Choice - see any doctor, not just VA. Accountability so bad VA employees can be FIRED. Forever GI Bill. The fake news gave me no credit. Our Veterans KNOW the truth!

The radical left is INDOCTRINATING your children! Critical Race Theory, gender ideology in schools, anti-American history - all GARBAGE being pumped into kids' heads. Parents have a RIGHT to know. School Choice is the answer!

Crime in Democrat-run cities is OUT OF CONTROL! Chicago, New York, Los Angeles - absolute WAR ZONES. The Defund the Police movement is the dumbest idea in history. We need LAW AND ORDER! Back the Blue! Vote Republican!

The border is WIDE OPEN and it's 100% Biden's fault! Millions of illegal aliens flooding in, fentanyl pouring across, terrorists on the watchlist crossing freely. We had the most secure border in history under Trump. Day One, I will SHUT IT DOWN!

We built HUNDREDS OF MILES of the most powerful, most beautiful wall ever constructed! Biden stopped it on Day One - left supplies rusting in the desert. Now we have an INVASION. When I return, we finish the wall. IMMEDIATELY!

Obamacare is a DISASTER! Premiums through the roof, terrible doctors, huge deductibles. 'You can keep your doctor' - the biggest lie in political history! We almost repealed it - one vote, thanks McCain. We will replace it with BETTER, CHEAPER healthcare!

Melania is the most ELEGANT, most BEAUTIFUL First Lady in the history of the White House. Speaks five languages. Incredible class and grace. The fake news treats her horribly because they are JEALOUS. Leave my family ALONE!

My children are INCREDIBLE - Ivanka, Don Jr., Eric, Barron, Tiffany. All successful, all smart, all outstanding people. The radical left tries to go after them viciously. VERY unfair. They are better than most politicians' entire families!

The Second Amendment is under ATTACK by the radical left! They want to take your guns away. It will NEVER happen while Trump is president. The right to bear arms is God-given and protected by our great Constitution. We will ALWAYS defend it!

AMERICA FIRST! Not globalism, not the radical left's open borders agenda, not the United Nations telling us what to do. AMERICA FIRST means American workers, American families, American security. Simple. Powerful. True. MAGA!

They said I was finished in 2016. WRONG! They said I was finished after impeachment #1. WRONG! Impeachment #2. WRONG! Four indictments. WRONG! They will say I'm finished again. We will see! Nobody fights like Trump. NOBODY!

My whole life people said certain things were impossible and I PROVED THEM WRONG every single time! The wall. The tax cuts. The vaccine. The peace deals. The economy. That's what REAL leaders do. They don't accept 'impossible.' They WIN!

Radical left LOSERS who couldn't run a lemonade stand want to lecture ME on economics? I built a MULTI-BILLION dollar empire from scratch. Created tens of thousands of jobs. Made BILLIONS in real estate, entertainment, golf. I know business!

The failing Washington Post gave me FOUR PINOCCHIOS for telling the truth. These are the same 'fact-checkers' who said the laptop was Russian disinformation. WRONG! Who said the lab leak was a conspiracy. WRONG! I'm always right!

Just got back from a MASSIVE rally - the biggest crowd in state history they are saying! People lined up for DAYS to see me. Incredible, wonderful, patriotic Americans. The love in that room was UNBELIEVABLE. Fake News didn't show the crowd!

Went to the championship game - the reception I received was EXTRAORDINARY! Tens of thousands of fans cheering, Trump signs everywhere, standing ovations throughout. The fake news cameras conveniently pointed away. What a surprise!

The stock market loved me - hit record high after record high under my watch! Investors knew I would NEVER let America fail. Under Biden it's a disaster. When I return, we will have the greatest market in history. BIGGER THAN EVER!

Saudi Arabia is going to make a TREMENDOUS investment in America - billions and billions of dollars and thousands of JOBS! They respect Trump. They didn't respect Obama. They definitely don't respect Sleepy Joe. Respect is EARNED!

Japan, South Korea, and all of Asia knew that Trump meant BUSINESS! They paid their fair share, they bought our products, they respected our strength. Now they see Biden and they are LAUGHING at us. America cannot afford to be weak!

Very unfair what they're doing to a once-loyal ally of mine. After everything I did for them, THIS is the thanks I get? People should remember who made them. Loyalty is the most important quality in any relationship. Always has been!

Some people who I helped A LOT have turned on me completely. You know who you are. The history books will not be kind to you. LOSERS and TRAITORS get remembered as losers and traitors. That's just the way it works. Sad!

A person who I made FAMOUS - gave them everything - is now saying terrible things. FAKE and VICIOUS lies. Their career is DEAD anyway. Nobody cares about them anymore. I don't even think about them! (Very little, anyway.)

Some LOSER who couldn't get elected dog-catcher is now criticizing the greatest president in modern history. PATHETIC! I built more in 4 years than they did in their entire worthless career. When I'm done, everyone will know the truth!
